prompt: Create a single-panel vertical anime-style portrait of a mysterious yokai woman shown from the chest up in left-facing profile, head tilted slightly upward with a calm, distant expression. She has luminous pure white hair in a loose low bun, with wispy bangs and flyaway strands glowing like overexposed light; one dark hairpin pierces the bun horizontally and has a small dangling chain with a tassel. Her skin and robe are deep electric blue, filled with storm-cloud textures and branching white lightning veins, as if her body is made of a living thunderstorm. She wears a traditional kimono with a pale collar and layered folds, the fabric blending into cloud patches and lightning streaks. Use an intense cyan-blue rim light tracing the entire silhouette, high contrast against a nearly black charcoal background. The composition is centered slightly right, with the face on the left third and the bright hair dominating the upper right. Style: cinematic Japanese anime illustration, ethereal supernatural villain energy, soft painterly edges, glowing bloom, volumetric light, delicate linework, dramatic darkness, no extra characters, no readable text except an optional tiny artist-signature-like scribble in the top right. Color palette should be black, electric blue, cyan, and pure white. Make the image feel like a beautiful thunder spirit inspired by a cold, elegant Spider-Man villain atmosphere.
promptEn: Create a single-panel vertical anime-style portrait of a mysterious yokai woman shown from the chest up in left-facing profile, head tilted slightly upward with a calm, distant expression. She has luminous pure white hair in a loose low bun, with wispy bangs and flyaway strands glowing like overexposed light; one dark hairpin pierces the bun horizontally and has a small dangling chain with a tassel. Her skin and robe are deep electric blue, filled with storm-cloud textures and branching white lightning veins, as if her body is made of a living thunderstorm. She wears a traditional kimono with a pale collar and layered folds, the fabric blending into cloud patches and lightning streaks. Use an intense cyan-blue rim light tracing the entire silhouette, high contrast against a nearly black charcoal background. The composition is centered slightly right, with the face on the left third and the bright hair dominating the upper right. Style: cinematic Japanese anime illustration, ethereal supernatural villain energy, soft painterly edges, glowing bloom, volumetric light, delicate linework, dramatic darkness, no extra characters, no readable text except an optional tiny artist-signature-like scribble in the top right. Color palette should be black, electric blue, cyan, and pure white. Make the image feel like a beautiful thunder spirit inspired by a cold, elegant Spider-Man villain atmosphere.
promptZh: 创作一张单格竖版动漫风格肖像，主角为 一位神秘的妖怪女性，展示胸部以上部位，呈左侧侧面视角，头部微微向上倾斜，表情冷静而疏离。她留着发光的纯白头发，扎成松散的低发髻，带有凌乱的刘海和像过曝灯光一样发光的碎发；一根深色发簪横向穿过发髻，并挂着一条带有流苏的小链子。她的皮肤和长袍呈深电光蓝色，布满了风暴云纹理和分叉的白色闪电脉络，仿佛她的身体是由活生生的雷暴构成。她身穿带有浅色领口和层叠褶皱的传统和服，布料融入了云朵斑块和闪电条纹。使用强烈的青蓝色轮廓光勾勒出整个剪影，与近乎黑色的炭灰色背景形成高对比度。构图略微偏右，脸部位于左侧三分之一处，明亮的头发占据右上角。风格：电影感日本动漫插画、空灵的超自然反派气质、柔和的绘画边缘、发光晕影、体积光、精致的线条、戏剧性的黑暗感，无额外角色，除右上角可选的微小艺术家签名式涂鸦外，无任何可读文字。调色板应为黑色、电光蓝、青色和纯白色。让画面呈现出一种受 冷峻优雅的蜘蛛侠反派氛围 启发的绝美雷电精灵之感。
